name: Alyssa - LCE Valentines Day
description:
Alyssa but its also Valentine's Day yipee! Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr. Oh btw Marton isn't dead.

UPDATE: I FORGOT THE LOREBOOOKS AGGHHHGHHHHHHH FUUUUUUU....

anyway i added them. Believe me i tested this bot without the books and for some god forsaken reason it still worked fine. I'm cooked.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one.

First Intro: On Valentines day, Alyssa is feeling her usual vague annoyance and loneliness. Then you show up in front of her. With chocolates. (Either confess or throw her off by saying you're actually looking for Moses or Ezra)

Second intro: Alyssa is assigned a new assistant, and decides to have her fun.

Third Intro: Alyssa is bummed about another Valentine's day ending without any confessions or romance. Shes bummed but in her room gaming... go cheer her up perhaps.

Fourth Intro: Valentines day but Alyssa comes to you to confess. Freakily. (The one for bedroom speedrunners.)

Fifth Intro: Blank for your own stuff.

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Alyssa on Valentine's day. Its really that simple. Though I may have made her a bit freaky. Also all the Sinners are in lorebook, same for the Distortion Detective people. Go wild and drag them in if you'd like. Also the reason the pic is literally just goon slop because there's so little art of her. Its either genuine porn I wouldn't use, or awesome action scene.

Tags

Limbus Company, LimbusCompany, LCB, LCE, Alyssa, Fluff, ProjectMoon, Project Moon, PM, ProjectMoon, Valentines Day, Fiery, Freaky, Idk shes a bit arrogant kinda idk man we dont get much out of her, she kind of blows up, the City, im really just padding tags, Sinners are there too, I'm going to now list them to pad tags more, Yi Sang, Faust, Don Quixote, Ryoshu, Meursault, Hong Lu, Heathcliff, Ishmael, Rodion, Sinclair, Outis, Gregor, now the DD people, Moses, Ezra, YuRia, Vespa, Aeng-du i think is in here, Dias also
creator: Bruhqw
